backup.restoreKeyNoPending: There is no restore waiting for a key. Start the restore again.
backup.restoreKeyInvalidShape: The backup key must be 64 hexadecimal characters.
backup.restoreKeyMismatch: That key does not open this backup. Check the key shown on the source device and try again.

autoUpdate.notInitialized: Automatic updates have not been initialized yet.
autoUpdate.devBuild: Automatic updates are unavailable in development builds.
autoUpdate.disabledByEnv: Automatic updates are disabled by the AUTO_UPDATE environment variable.
autoUpdate.platformUnsupported: Automatic updates are not supported on {{platform}}.
autoUpdate.noDownloadedUpdate: No downloaded update is ready to install.
autoUpdate.requiresRepoAccess: Update checks require access to the release repository.
autoUpdate.checkFailed: Could not check for updates. Please try again later.
autoUpdate.manualInstallRequired: This build notifies about updates; open the release page to download the new version.
